description:

full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25766

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-25766.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.25.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.25.el8.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.25.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.25.el8.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/leapp-repository-0.20.0-2.0.25.el8.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.20.0-2.0.25]
- Add additional mappings for OL9 upgrade [Orabug: 38640419]
- Add additional problematic i686 package [Orabug: 38544332]
- Update supported RHCK version [Orabug: 38640727]
- Add mappings for mysql 8.4 stream [Orabug: 38644271]
